analysis.reasoning: Core message: External pressure against China strengthens Chinese unity, social cohesion, and economic resilience. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – implied presence of hostile 'external pressure' on China; while not naming the West, this euphemism commonly refers to Western pressure/sanctions, casting China as a target, so CH1 is supported implicitly. CH2 (benevolent power) – no claims about international cooperation or benevolence; not supported. CH3 (epic history) – invokes 'History has proved' and emphasizes resilience overcoming adversity, fitting the historical resilience theme; supported. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – no explicit praise of the political system or values; not supported. CH5 (CCP succeeds) – mentions stronger cohesion and better economic resilience as outcomes under pressure, suggesting governance efficacy, but it does not explicitly credit the government; however, portraying national cohesion and economic resilience can reflect government success; moderately supported. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – not relevant.
